title: Soul Of Light Episode 2 Indonesia, English Sub
description:
English

Some people say that the world is a great ocean of suffering. When a person is at sea his body is a boat, and his soul is that of a person who is in a boat sailing to the opposite shore. The Qian Dynasty is very prosperous, prosperous and respected by the world. However, beneath the strong surface, undercurrents are being turbulent. Enemies from far and near were watching them, and the eight Devils were about to move through the world. In a world full of controversy, Hong Yi, a young scholar, asked the world his first question. Hong Yi is the son of Hong Xuanji, the most powerful official in the dynasty, and Meng Bingyun, the supreme Holy Lady of Taishang Dao. He lost his mother when he was young. And as a lowly son-in-law, he has always been bullied. But this can't stop Hong Yi from studying. Coincidentally, Hong Yi embarked on the extremely difficult and dangerous road of martial arts double cultivation. , Under the pressure of fate, he gallantly fought him and defeated many powerful enemies, and eventually became a generation legend.

Indonesia

Beberapa orang mengatakan bahwa dunia adalah lautan penderitaan yang besar. Ketika seseorang berada di laut tubuhnya adalah sebuah perahu, dan jiwanya adalah orang yang berada di dalam perahu yang berlayar ke pantai seberang. Dinasti Qian sangatlah makmur, sejahtera dan dihormati dunia. Namun, di bawah permukaan yang kuat, arus bawah sedang bergejolak. Musuh dari jauh dan dekat mengawasi mereka, dan delapan Iblis hendak bergerak memenatau dunia. Dalam dunia yang penuh kontroversi, Hong Yi, seorang cendekiawan muda, mengajukan pertanyaan pertamanya kepada dunia. Hong Yi adalah putra Hong Xuanji, pejabat paling kuat di dinasti, dan Meng Bingyun, Wanita Suci tertinggi dari Taishang Dao. Dia kehilangan ibunya ketika dia masih muda. dan sebagai menantu rendahan, dia selalu diintimidasi. Tetapi ini tidak dapat menghentikan Hong Yi untuk belajar. Secara kebetulan, Hong Yi memulai jalan yang sangat sulit dan berbahaya berupa kultivasi ganda seni bela diri., Di bawah tekanan takdir, dia dengan gagah melawannya dan mengalahkan banyak musuh yang kuat, dan pada akhirnya menjadi legenda generasi.

Soul Of Light Subtitle Indonesia, English, Portuguese, Turkish, Spanish, Italian, Polish, Arabic, Thai, German
